title: Section 29
content: When the beneficiary's interest is forfeited or awarded by legal adjudication 1[to the Government], the trustee is bound to hold the trust-property to the extent of such interest for the benefit of such person in such manner as 2the State Government may direct in this behalf.
footnote: 1 The words "to Government" successively amended by the A.O. 1937 and the A.O. 1950, to read as above. 2. Subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "the Government".
